leadText: Armorite Ore (Japanese: ヨロイこうせき Armor Ore) is a type of item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] A Master Dojo Student inside the Master Dojo will teach the player one of the new moves introduced in Version 1.2.0 in exchange for five pieces of Armorite Ore each. The Digging Pa in the Training Lowlands will offer to dig up some Watts for the player in exchange for seven pieces of Armorite Ore per digging session. A female NPC at the Workout Sea will fully reset the EVs of one of the player's Pokémon every time she is given ten pieces of Armorite Ore.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Rare ore that can be obtained on the Isle of Armor. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector on the Isle of Armor.
